halts.trigger: Spec primary target identifiers (DOI 10.1088/1751-8113/43/23/235202 + arXiv:0911.1762) reproducibly resolve to two unrelated 2010 papers. There is no Witte-Forrester paper at J. Phys. A 43 (2010) 235202 / arXiv:0911.1762.
halts.evidence: discrepancy_log.json WF10_DISC_001 (route_findings.md Phase A); both author arXiv listings cross-checked.
halts.halt_action: Phases A.3 (OA verification of OA status of spec target), B (route probes per spec list), and C (slot 17 deposit under spec label) were halted. Phase A was completed against substitute (math/0512142). Phase B was repurposed to substitute selection. Phase C was completed against substitute, with slot 17 deposit deferred pending Claude/operator authorization (cannot mis-label slot 17).
halts.spec_halt_condition_match: Not directly listed in spec section 4 (which only lists homomorphism-disagreement halts), but qualifies under SOP standing halt: 'Any result contradicts a prior AEAL-logged claim' (here, the spec's own bibliographic claim) plus 'unexpected positive/negative result' clause.
halts.downstream_consequence: Verdict transitions from §7 ladder UPGRADE_WF10_ACQUIRED_W_HOMOMORPHISM_FOUND/NOT_IN_WF10/NIA_PAYWALL to a fourth, ladder-extending verdict UPGRADE_WF10_SPEC_BIBLIOGRAPHIC_ERROR_SUBSTITUTE_PROBED — reported in handoff.md.
